children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this chapter, the Secretary may, after opportunity for public comment, promulgate regulations that describe conditions under which amounts in the fund may be used to provide incentives to promote remining of eligible land under in a manner that leverages the use of amounts from the fund to achieve more reclamation with respect to the eligible land than would be achieved without the incentives.section 1234 of this title

children.heading: Requirements
children.label: b Requirements
children.text: Any regulations promulgated under subsection (a) shall specify that the incentives shall apply only if the Secretary determines, with the concurrence of the State regulatory authority referred to in subchapter V, that, without the incentives, the eligible land would not be likely to be remined and reclaimed.

children.label: A
children.text: a rebate or waiver of the reclamation fees required under ; andsection 1232(a) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the use of amounts in the fund to provide financial assurance for remining operations in lieu of all or a portion of the performance bonds required under .section 1259 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: remove or reprocess abandoned coal mine waste; or

children.label: ii
children.text: conduct remining activities that meet the priorities specified in paragraph (1) or (2) of .section 1233(a) of this title

children.heading: Amount
children.label: B Amount
children.text: The amount of a rebate or waiver provided as an incentive under paragraph (1)(A) to remine or reclaim eligible land shall not exceed the estimated cost of reclaiming the eligible land under this section.
